fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: The IMA OpenAPI client ID sent with the ima-openapi-clientid header. Get it from the Tencent IMA desktop client.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: The IMA OpenAPI API key sent with the ima-openapi-apikey header. Get it from the Tencent IMA desktop client.

actions.name: add_note_to_knowledge_base
actions.description: Add an existing IMA note into one IMA knowledge base.

folderId.description: The target folder ID inside the knowledge base.

noteId.description: The IMA note ID to add.

title.description: The title to use for the knowledge-base item.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for adding an IMA note into a knowledge base.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for adding an IMA note into a knowledge base.

actions.name: append_note
actions.description: Append Markdown content to an existing IMA note.

content.description: The Markdown content to append to the note.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for appending to an IMA note.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for appending to an IMA note.

actions.name: check_repeated_names
actions.description: Check whether file names already exist in an IMA knowledge-base folder.

folderId.description: The target folder ID inside the knowledge base.

mediaType.description: The IMA media type for this file.

items.description: One file name and media type to check.

files.description: The files to check for duplicate names.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for checking repeated IMA knowledge-base file names.

isRepeated.description: Whether a file with this name already exists in the target folder.

items.description: One IMA duplicate filename check result.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for repeated-name checks.

actions.name: create_note
actions.description: Create a new IMA note from Markdown content.

content.description: The Markdown content to import as a new note.

folderId.description: The notebook folder ID that should receive the new note.

folderName.description: The notebook folder name that should receive the new note.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating an IMA note.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for creating an IMA note.

actions.name: get_knowledge_bases
actions.description: Fetch metadata for one or more IMA knowledge bases.

items.description: One unique IMA knowledge base ID.

knowledgeBaseIds.description: The unique IMA knowledge-base IDs to fetch.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching IMA knowledge-base metadata.

anyOf.description: The knowledge base name.
The knowledge base cover image URL.
The knowledge base description.

items.description: One recommended question returned by IMA.

recommendedQuestions.description: The recommended questions configured for the knowledge base.

items.description: One normalized IMA knowledge base summary.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for fetching IMA knowledge-base metadata.

actions.name: get_knowledge_item_original
actions.description: Fetch access information for a knowledge-base item and download URL-backed original content through local transit storage when available.

fileName.description: The preferred transit file name when downloading URL content.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving original IMA knowledge-base content.

anyOf.description: The original media URL when IMA can provide one.
The HTTP headers required when fetching the original media URL.
The linked IMA note ID when the media is a note.

accessible.description: Whether the media can be accessed through a URL or linked note ID.

anyOf.description: The note content when the media item is an IMA note.

downloadUrl.description: The local URL for downloading the original file.

sizeBytes.description: The downloaded file size in bytes.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded original file.

anyOf.description: A downloaded original file stored in local transit storage.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for original IMA knowledge-base content retrieval.

actions.name: get_media_info
actions.description: Get IMA knowledge-base media access information for one media item.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching IMA media information.

anyOf.description: The original media URL when IMA can provide one.
The HTTP headers required when fetching the original media URL.
The linked IMA note ID when the media is a note.

accessible.description: Whether the media can be accessed through a URL or linked note ID.

actions.name: get_note_content
actions.description: Fetch the plain-text or JSON content for one IMA note.

targetContentFormat.description: The target content format returned by IMA.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching IMA note content.

targetContentFormat.description: The target content format returned by IMA.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for fetching IMA note content.

actions.name: import_urls
actions.description: Import webpages or WeChat article URLs into one IMA knowledge base.

folderId.description: The target folder ID inside the knowledge base.

items.description: One webpage or WeChat article URL.

urls.description: The URLs to import into the knowledge base.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for importing URLs into an IMA knowledge base.

retCode.description: The per-URL return code reported by IMA.

anyOf.description: The created media ID when the import succeeds.

items.description: One normalized IMA URL import result.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for importing URLs into an IMA knowledge base.

actions.name: list_addable_knowledge_bases
actions.description: List the IMA knowledge bases that accept new content.

limit.description: The maximum number of knowledge bases to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing addable IMA knowledge bases.

anyOf.description: The knowledge base name.
The knowledge base cover image URL.
The knowledge base description.

items.description: One recommended question returned by IMA.

recommendedQuestions.description: The recommended questions configured for the knowledge base.

items.description: One normalized IMA knowledge base summary.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next addable knowledge-base page, if any.

isEnd.description: Whether this addable knowledge-base page is the last page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing addable IMA knowledge bases.

actions.name: list_knowledge_items
actions.description: List files and folders inside one IMA knowledge-base folder.

folderId.description: The target folder ID inside the knowledge base.

limit.description: The maximum number of files and folders to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing IMA knowledge-base items.

anyOf.description: The knowledge media ID when the item is a file.
The folder ID when the item is a folder.
The knowledge title when the item is a file.
The folder name when the item is a folder.
The parent folder ID.
The number of files in the folder.
The number of child folders in the folder.
Whether the folder is pinned to the top.
The highlighted content fragment returned by search.
The knowledge media ID when the item is a file.
The folder ID when the item is a folder.
The knowledge title when the item is a file.
The folder name when the item is a folder.
The parent folder ID.
The number of files in the folder.
The number of child folders in the folder.
Whether the folder is pinned to the top.
The highlighted content fragment returned by search.

currentPath.description: The normalized breadcrumb folders for the current location.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next knowledge-item page, if any.

isEnd.description: Whether this knowledge-item page is the last page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing IMA knowledge-base items.

actions.name: list_notebooks
actions.description: List IMA note folders for the connected account.

limit.description: The maximum number of notebooks to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing IMA notebooks.

anyOf.description: The notebook name.
The number of notes in the notebook.
The notebook creation time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
The notebook modification time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
The parent notebook folder ID.
The IMA notebook type.
The cursor for the next notebook page, if any.

isEnd.description: Whether this notebook page is the last page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing IMA notebooks.

actions.name: list_notes
actions.description: List notes in one IMA notebook or across all notes.

folderId.description: The notebook folder ID to list. Omit it to list across all notes.

limit.description: The maximum number of notes to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing IMA notes.

anyOf.description: The note title.
The note summary returned by IMA.
The note creation time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
The note modification time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
The notebook ID that owns the note.
The notebook name that owns the note.
A string-to-string map returned by IMA.
The cursor for the next note page, if any.

isEnd.description: Whether this note page is the last page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing IMA notes.

actions.name: search_knowledge_bases
actions.description: Search IMA knowledge bases by name, or pass an empty query to list accessible knowledge bases.

query.description: The knowledge-base search query. Use an empty string to list accessible bases.

limit.description: The maximum number of knowledge bases to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching IMA knowledge bases.

anyOf.description: The knowledge base name.
The knowledge base cover image URL.
The knowledge base description.

items.description: One recommended question returned by IMA.

recommendedQuestions.description: The recommended questions configured for the knowledge base.

items.description: One normalized IMA knowledge base summary.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next knowledge-base page, if any.

isEnd.description: Whether this knowledge-base page is the last page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for searching IMA knowledge bases.

actions.name: search_knowledge_items
actions.description: Search files and folders inside one IMA knowledge base.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching IMA knowledge-base items.

anyOf.description: The knowledge media ID when the item is a file.
The folder ID when the item is a folder.
The knowledge title when the item is a file.
The folder name when the item is a folder.
The parent folder ID.
The number of files in the folder.
The number of child folders in the folder.
Whether the folder is pinned to the top.
The highlighted content fragment returned by search.
The cursor for the next knowledge-item search page, if any.

isEnd.description: Whether this knowledge-item search page is the last page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for searching IMA knowledge-base items.

actions.name: search_notes
actions.description: Search IMA notes by title or note body text.

start.description: The zero-based start offset for this search page.

limit.description: The maximum number of notes to request for this page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching IMA notes.

anyOf.description: The note title.
The note summary returned by IMA.
The note creation time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
The note modification time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
The notebook ID that owns the note.
The notebook name that owns the note.
A string-to-string map returned by IMA.

isEnd.description: Whether this page is the last search page.

totalHitCount.description: The total number of matched notes.

anyOf.description: The next start offset to use for another page, if any.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for searching IMA notes.

actions.name: upload_file_to_knowledge_base
actions.description: Upload a file from an HTTP URL into one IMA knowledge base, including duplicate checks, COS upload, and add_knowledge.

folderId.description: The target folder ID inside the knowledge base.

fileUrl.description: The HTTP or HTTPS URL whose bytes should be uploaded to IMA.

fileName.description: The file name to store in IMA, including the extension.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the file. If omitted, IMA upload type is inferred from fileName.

duplicatePolicy.description: How to handle an existing file with the same name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for uploading a file into an IMA knowledge base.

mediaType.description: The IMA media type used for upload.

contentType.description: The MIME type uploaded to COS.

fileSize.description: The uploaded file size in bytes.

duplicate.description: Whether the original file name was already repeated.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for an uploaded IMA knowledge-base file.
